zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，上行趋势延续
zh.content:
从当前价格表现看，XRP/USD报1.1847，已运行至当日区间高位附近，24小时上涨0.72%。价格持续站稳20日均线1.15755上方，显示中短期多头结构保持完整，市场情绪偏乐观，整体呈现震荡上行格局。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为0.01124且维持正值区域，表明多头动能仍占据优势。不过RSI数据暂缺，无法进一步确认是否进入超买区间。从价格与均线关系观察，当前币价较SMA20高出约2.3%，趋势仍具一定延续性。

关键位置方面，短线支撑位关注1.1756附近，即日内低点区域；进一步支撑位位于1.1575附近的20日均线。上方首个阻力位在1.1860附近，若有效突破并站稳，则有望向1.20整数关口发起挑战，打开新的上涨空间。

交易策略上，短线投资者可关注回踩1.1760至1.1800区域后的企稳机会，顺势参与多头交易。若价格突破1.1860并伴随成交量放大，可考虑追随突破走势；若跌破1.1756支撑，则需警惕短期调整风险，适当控制仓位并设置止损。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is maintaining a constructive short-term bullish structure, trading at 1.1847 and holding above its 20-period simple moving average at 1.1576. The price is currently positioned near the session high of 1.1860, indicating sustained buying interest throughout the recent trading period. The 0.72% daily gain reinforces positive momentum, while the ability to remain above the moving average suggests that buyers continue to control the broader near-term trend.

Momentum indicators also favor the bullish case. Although the RSI(14) reading is unavailable, the positive MACD value of 0.0112 indicates upward momentum remains intact. The absence of a signal-line reading limits crossover analysis, but the positive MACD itself suggests the market is still benefiting from underlying buying pressure. As long as momentum remains positive and price action continues to post higher lows, the probability of further upside exploration remains elevated.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near 1.1756, the session low, followed by stronger support around the SMA(20) region at 1.1576. A break below these levels could trigger a deeper retracement toward the 1.1450–1.1500 zone. On the upside, resistance is emerging near 1.1860, where the market is currently testing intraday highs. A decisive breakout above this area could open the path toward the psychological 1.2000 level, with additional bullish targets potentially extending beyond that threshold.

For traders, the current setup favors a cautiously bullish approach while price remains above the 1.1756 support area. Momentum traders may look for confirmation through a sustained break above 1.1860 before initiating new long positions. More conservative participants could wait for pullbacks toward support zones to improve risk-reward conditions. Risk management remains essential, as failure to hold above near-term support would weaken the bullish outlook and increase the likelihood of corrective price action.
